Premium Construction Material

STONE AGGREGATE
Manufacturers & Suppliers, {" "}Delhi NCR

Stone Aggregate is a high-quality construction material widely used in residential, commercial and infrastructure projects. It provides excellent strength, durability and stability for concrete, road construction, drainage and foundation applications.

Pricing ₹850 – ₹950 / Ton
Stock AVAILABLE
{/* ================= Tabs ================= */}
{tab === "description" && (

Stone Aggregate at Affordable Prices

Stone Aggregate is one of the most important materials used in modern construction. It is extensively used in concrete, road construction, bridges, drainage systems and building foundations because of its superior strength, durability and long service life.

Our premium quality Stone Aggregate is carefully processed and graded to provide excellent load-bearing capacity, better bonding with cement and consistent performance in residential, commercial and industrial construction projects.

Advantages of Stone Aggregate

✓

High Strength

Provides excellent compressive strength for concrete and structural applications.

✓

Durable Material

Long-lasting material with excellent resistance to wear and weather conditions.

✓

Excellent Bonding

Improves the bonding strength of concrete and enhances structural stability.

✓

Multiple Sizes

Available in different sizes suitable for foundations, roads and RCC works.

✓

Low Water Absorption

Helps maintain concrete quality with minimal moisture absorption.

✓

Wide Applications

Ideal for buildings, highways, bridges, landscaping and infrastructure projects.

)} {/* ================= Specification ================= */} {tab === "specification" && (

Technical Specification

Available Sizes 10 mm, 20 mm & 40 mm
Material Natural Crushed Stone
Density Approximately 750 kg/m³
Strength Grade A
Water Absorption Less than 0.5%
Applications RCC, Roads, Foundations, Drainage, Bridges & Construction Works
)} {/* ================= Video ================= */} {tab === "video" && (

)}
); } export default StoneAggregatePage;
